route53recoverycontrol.cluster.CfnAbout: Creates a cluster in Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller. A cluster is a set of redundant Regional endpoints that you can run Route 53 ARC API calls against to update or get the state of one or more routing controls.

route53recoverycontrol.cluster.Name.Description: Name of the cluster. You can use any non-white space character in the name except the following: & > < ' (single quote) " (double quote) ; (semicolon).
